Description: Number of shares sold short under regulatory exemptions (such as bona fide market making or Rule 201/SSR) on NYSE Arca on the given date
Number of shares sold short on NYSE Arca on the given date, excluding short exempt trades
Total number of shares traded for the symbol on NYSE Arca on the given date, including all executed shares (long, short—both exempt and non-exempt, market maker, and odd-lot transactions)
